chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.1932 of 2021 ______________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No.8264/21 (urgent) 2. For order on office objection no.18 3. For order on Misc. No.8265/21 (exp.) 4. For order on Misc. No.8266/21 (stay) 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 17.03.2021 Mr. Samiullah Soomro, advocate for petitioner. -.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. It is contended inter-alia that the petitioner in pursuance of public notice dated 20.10.2019, published in leading Newspapers, Sindh Public Service Commission (SPSC) invited 92 posts of Veterinary Officer (BPS-17) in Poultry Wing of Livestock and Fisheries Department, Government of Sindh. Per learned counsel, he participated in the subject examination and was declared a successful candidate in written test vide press release dated 1.10.2020, however, the respondent-SPSC has failed and neglected to conduct his interview for the subject post as he was amongst the successful candidates as discussed supra. Learned counsel seeks directions to the respondents to conduct his interview for the subject post, which is the on-going process, started w.e.f. 08.02.2021. He prays for notice. To appreciate as to whether petitioner was declared successful candidate in the written test conducted by SPSC vide Press Release dated 1.10.2020; and, consequently, his candidature is liable to be assessed by the Competent Authority or otherwise, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for a date to be fixed by the office after one week.

He prays for notice. To appreciate as to whether petitioner was declared successful candidate in the written test conducted by SPSC vide Press Release dated 1.10.2020; and, consequently, his candidature is liable to be assessed by the Competent Authority or otherwise, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for a date to be fixed by the office after one week. Judge Judge
